business.name: Nathan Baugh Heating & Cooling, LLC
business.tagline: Same-day service when your unit quits

hero.headline: When your AC dies in *July heat*, we answer the phone
hero.subheadline: 247 five-star reviews don't lie — we show up fast and fix it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every HVAC job, handled right
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to complete system installations

services.title: Emergency AC Repair
services.description: Unit died in the heat? We'll have you cool again within hours, not days. Our techs carry the parts that break most often.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: Furnace acting up before the cold hits? We tune, repair, and replace heating systems to keep you warm all winter.

services.title: Complete System Installation
services.description: New construction or full replacement — we size it right and install it clean. No shortcuts, no mess left behind.

services.title: Ductwork & Ventilation
services.description: Adding vents, sealing leaks, or running new ducts. We make sure the air gets where it needs to go efficiently.

about.heading: Macon's most trusted HVAC team
about.body: Nathan Baugh started this company to do HVAC work the right way — show up when we say we will, fix what's broken, and clean up after ourselves. Our techs like Darin, Daniel, and Travis have built our reputation one five-star job at a time. When your system breaks, Macon calls us first.

reviews.name: Kaylee V.
reviews.text: AC issues for almost a month until Darin came out same day and fixed it. Professional and fast — we finally have air again!

reviews.name: Toni P.
reviews.text: Only company that called back within an hour for our emergency. Unit was running again within hours of our call.

reviews.name: Renate J.
reviews.text: On time, respectful, thorough work. Fair price and truly professional. Would refer Nathan to everyone.

reviews.name: Monica S.
reviews.text: All 5-star ratings seemed too good to be true, but Daniel proved why. Same-day service and exceptional work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Fast service throughout the greater Macon area

cta.heading: Your AC won't fix itself
cta.body: Don't sweat it another day. Call the team that shows up fast and gets your system running right.
